## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pipeline review and sales strategy discussion for growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pipeline needs significant expansion; current volume insufficient for July targets](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Marcel to aggressively leverage network/event contacts for warm leads](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Team to implement daily outreach process with Marcel's direct involvement](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [New product features (e.g. content inventory, LLM tracking) to be highlighted in sales pitches](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Upcoming workshop (Aug 1) and content strategy to boost top-of-funnel growth](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Topics

### Current Pipeline Status

  - [July target: 3 more kickoffs needed](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Current pipeline volume insufficient; only 3-4 intro calls/week](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Conversion rates unclear; need to analyze last 8 weeks of data](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Team to compile list of high-potential leads for Marcel's direct outreach](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)

### New Opportunities from Recent Events

  - [Tavern: AI Series A company, $3-4M ARR, gearing for Series B](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Grid: Load balancing for power grid, partnerships with Rivian, Tesla, PG\&E](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Several other warm leads from dinner/happy hour events to be pursued](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### Sales Process Improvements

  - [Implement daily outreach block for Marcel with pre-drafted messages](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Enhance visibility into pipeline metrics (e.g. meetings booked, qualification rates)](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Leverage customer success stories (e.g. Sentinel-1, Abnormal) in outreach](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Utilize recorded content (e.g. "0 to $7M" presentation) for nurturing cold leads](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)

### Product Updates for Sales

  - [New demo capabilities: chat suggestions with text changes](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Upcoming features: content inventory, website opportunity finder](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [LLM tracking to be emphasized more in pitches and strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [In-app mockups and predefined prompts display coming in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

### Upsell Opportunities

  - [WebStacks identified as potential upsell target](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Strategy sprint option to be presented in upsell discussions](https://fathom.video/share/wMrwD3vmzXpMivVdtZNToNb3ajtsvKnT?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
